name: Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a slice from the stem end of each pepper. Remove seeds and wash thoroughly.
2. Bring 3/4 cup salted water per pepper to a boil in a large pot. Add peppers and cook for 5 minutes. Drain and set aside.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Cook ground beef, garlic, and onion in a skillet until onions are tender. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
5. Stir salt, cooked rice, and half the tomato sauce into the meat mixture. Heat through.
6. Stuff each pepper with the meat mixture.
7. Place peppers upright in a baking dish.
8. Pour remaining tomato sauce over the peppers and bake covered for 45 minutes.
9. Remove cover and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes.
